CustomField.description: Procedure type governing APA litigation exposure. Expedited/Emergency and Alternative Arrangement procedures with incomplete administrative records receive a 1.5x risk multiplier from NEPA_Litigation_Risk_Scorer. Standard procedures are unaffected.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Standard, Expedited/Emergency (e.g. 14-day EA, 28-day EIS), or Alternative Arrangement. Expedited + incomplete record triggers APA risk penalty.
CustomField.label: Review Timeline Type
